{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201719510900991A2142A0ACC7A1"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592513702287229758","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真实客观，反映当时存在的问题以极范文程机智的解决办法，化解了满汉两家存在的问题，里现了范文程的聪明才智，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767774128,"group_id":"7574250613496613912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2nZUesDNZZehXELbvtsU6q70q5NP6GjVeIDvrIydJp3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1921594464673582","user_name":"瓜子洲的小庄子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1921594464673582","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574250613496613912","book_info":{"abstract":"在明末清初的乱世洪流中，有一位汉人谋士，以超凡的智慧与远见，跨越民族界限，辅佐后金（清）四代君主，从潜龙在渊的草莽政权，到定鼎中原的大一统王朝，他的身影贯穿了清朝开国的关键历程，此人便是范文程。本书以的宏大篇幅，细腻勾勒这位 “乱世谋臣” 从 1 岁到 69 岁的传奇一生，既是一部个人命运史，更是一部明清易代的微观政治军事史诗。
对于历史爱好者而言，本书可作为理解清朝开国史的 “微观读本”，透过范文程的个人经历，窥见后金（清）政权制度建设、军事扩张、民族政策的演变细节；对于职场与管理者而言，其在复杂环境中协调利益、推动改革、功成身退的智慧，具有跨越时代的借鉴意义；而对于普通读者，这部传记更讲述了一个关于 “选择与坚守” 的故事 —— 在乱世浮沉中，如何以个人才智影响时代走向，又如何在权力巅峰保持清醒与温度。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b2a33fac9427c95b4eb70b2ff86dec8","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7574250613496613912","book_name":"清朝第一谋臣：范文程","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574259883738923544","read_count":"829","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"408484"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"179","tags":"历史古代,历史,明朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4fd0829df63f2ee8b1283f6d16804c09~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182391&x-signature=uk6BhNT1YLGGGSReuKmTHHTOocU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108952275312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201719510900991A2142A0ACC7A1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3990,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":108},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593363982023672601","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"再现历史的另一个角度，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":176
